# SolidKit

> Modern SolidJS component library with accessible primitives, semantic layout system, Effect services, and theme-driven design tokens. Built on Kobalte headless components.

## Components

### Display
- **Accordion**: Component. Props: `{ items: AccordionItemData[], type?: 'single' | 'multiple', defaultValue?: string | string[], collapsible?: boolean, disabled?: boolean, +3 more }`
- **Badge**: Component. Props: `{ variant?: 'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info', type?: 'label' | 'dot' | 'count', count?: number, maxCount?: number, children?: JSX.Element, +3 more }`
- **Card**: Component. Props: `{ variant?: 'default' | 'outlined' | 'elevated', padding?: 'none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', onClick?: () => void, hoverable?: boolean, children: JSX.Element, +4 more }`
- **CardHeader**: Component. Props: `{ children: JSX.Element, unstyled?: boolean, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **CardTitle**: Component. Props: `{ children: JSX.Element, unstyled?: boolean, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **CardDescription**: Component. Props: `{ children: JSX.Element, unstyled?: boolean, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **CardContent**: Component. Props: `{ children: JSX.Element, unstyled?: boolean, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **CardFooter**: Component. Props: `{ children: JSX.Element, unstyled?: boolean, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **CodeBlock**: Component. Props: `{ code: string, language?: string, label?: string, showLineNumbers?: boolean, class?: string, +1 more }`
- **Collapsible**: Component. Props: `{ open?: boolean, defaultOpen?: boolean, onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void, disabled?: boolean, trigger: JSX.Element, +5 more }`
- **ColorDot**: Component. Props: `{ color: string, size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', class?: string }`
- **Dialog**: Component. Props: `{ open: boolean, onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void, title: string, description?: string, children: JSX.Element, +2 more }`
- **Dropdown**: Component. Props: `{ items: DropdownItem[], trigger: JSX.Element, class?: string, unstyled?: boolean }`
- **ImagePreview**: Component. Props: `{ images: ImagePreviewItem[], onRemove?: (id: string) => void, maxVisible?: number, class?: string }`
- **Markdown**: Component. Props: `{ content: string, streaming?: boolean, components?: Partial<MarkdownComponents>, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties, +1 more }`
- **MetricCard**: Component. Props: `{ label: string, value: string | number, variant?: 'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info' | 'accent', icon?: JSX.Element, trend?: string, +7 more }`
- **ProjectCard**: Component. Props: `{ name: string, icon?: string, color?: string, subtitle?: string, description?: string, +4 more }`
- **Separator**: Component. Props: `{ orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical', unstyled?: boolean, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **Skeleton**: Component. Props: `{ variant?: 'rect' | 'circle' | 'text', width?: string | number, height?: string | number, size?: number, lines?: number, +2 more }`
- **StatusDot**: Component. Props: `{ status?: 'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info', size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', pulse?: boolean, label?: string, aria-label?: string, +3 more }`
- **StreamingText**: Component. Props: `{ chunks: Accessor<string[]>, format?: 'markdown' | 'plain', autoScroll?: boolean, class?: string }`
- **SuggestionChips**: Component. Props: `{ chips: SuggestionChip[], onSelect: (chip: SuggestionChip) => void, class?: string }`
- **Table**: Component. Props: `{ columns: TableColumn<T>[], data: T[], onRowClick?: (item: T) => void, selectedKey?: string | null, getRowKey: (item: T) => string, +4 more }`
- **Tabs**: Component. Props: `{ items: TabItem[], value?: string, onChange?: (value: string) => void, orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical', class?: string }`
- **TerminalOutput**: Component. Props: `{ lines: TerminalLine[], maxLines?: number, showTimestamps?: boolean, class?: string }`
- **Timeline**: Component. Props: `{ steps: TimelineStep[], orientation?: 'vertical' | 'horizontal', size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **Tooltip**: Component. Props: `{ content: string | JSX.Element, placement?: 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right', delay?: number, children: JSX.Element, class?: string, +1 more }`
- **Sparkline**: Component. Props: `{ data: number[], width?: number, height?: number, color?: string, strokeWidth?: number, +4 more }`
- **WaterfallChart**: Component. Props: `{ items: WaterfallItem[], height?: number, labelWidth?: number, tickCount?: number, class?: string, +1 more }`
- **SignalGrid**: Component. Props: `{ cells: SignalGridCell[], columns?: number, colorScale?: (value: number) => string, cellSize?: number, gap?: number, +2 more }`
- **Popover**: Component. Props: `{ trigger: JSX.Element, content: JSX.Element, placement?: 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right', open?: boolean, onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void, +2 more }`

### Input
- **AudioInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: File | File[] | null, onChange: (files: File | File[] | null) => void, mode?: 'single' | 'list', accept?: string, maxSize?: number, +6 more }`
- **Button**: Component. Props: `{ variant?: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'danger' | 'outline' | 'link', size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', loading?: boolean, disabled?: boolean, fullWidth?: boolean, +9 more }`
- **ColorInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: string, defaultValue?: string, onChange?: (color: string) => void, format?: 'hex' | 'rgb' | 'hsl', showAlpha?: boolean, +6 more }`
- **DateInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: string, defaultValue?: string, onChange?: (value: string) => void, min?: string, max?: string, +9 more }`
- **DropZone**: Component. Props: `{ onDrop: (files: File[]) => void, accept?: string, multiple?: boolean, maxSize?: number, disabled?: boolean, +5 more }`
- **FileInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: File | File[] | null, onChange: (files: File | File[] | null) => void, mode?: 'single' | 'list', accept?: string, maxSize?: number, +4 more }`
- **ImageInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: File | File[] | null, onChange: (files: File | File[] | null) => void, mode?: 'single' | 'multiple', accept?: string, maxSize?: number, +7 more }`
- **Input**: Component. Props: `{ type?: 'text' | 'email' | 'password' | 'search' | 'url', placeholder?: string, value?: string, onInput?: (value: string) => void, disabled?: boolean, +5 more }`
- **Textarea**: Component. Props: `{ placeholder?: string, value?: string, onInput?: (value: string) => void, autoResize?: boolean, minRows?: number, +7 more }`
- **Kbd**: Component. Props: `{ children?: JSX.Element, keys?: string[], class?: string }`
- **NumberInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: number, defaultValue?: number, onChange?: (value: number) => void, min?: number, max?: number, +8 more }`
- **RangeSlider**: Component. Props: `{ value?: [number, number], defaultValue?: [number, number], onChange?: (value: [number, number]) => void, min?: number, max?: number, +6 more }`
- **SearchInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: string, placeholder?: string, shortcut?: string, onSearch?: (value: string) => void, onChange?: (value: string) => void, +5 more }`
- **Select**: Component. Props: `{ options: SelectOption[], value?: string, onChange?: (value: string) => void, placeholder?: string, disabled?: boolean, +2 more }`
- **Slider**: Component. Props: `{ value?: number, defaultValue?: number, onChange?: (value: number) => void, min?: number, max?: number, +6 more }`
- **Switch**: Component. Props: `{ checked?: boolean, defaultChecked?: boolean, onChange?: (checked: boolean) => void, disabled?: boolean, label?: string, +4 more }`
- **TagInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: string[], defaultValue?: string[], onChange?: (tags: string[]) => void, suggestions?: string[], placeholder?: string, +7 more }`
- **VideoInput**: Component. Props: `{ value?: File | File[] | null, onChange: (files: File | File[] | null) => void, mode?: 'single' | 'list', accept?: string, maxSize?: number, +5 more }`
- **FilterChip**: Component. Props: `{ label: string, selected?: boolean, onToggle?: (selected: boolean) => void, color?: string, icon?: JSX.Element, +4 more }`
- **SegmentedBar**: Component. Props: `{ segments: SegmentedBarSegment[], height?: number, borderRadius?: string, animated?: boolean, class?: string, +1 more }`
- **Checkbox**: Component. Props: `{ checked?: boolean, defaultChecked?: boolean, onChange?: (checked: boolean) => void, label?: string, disabled?: boolean, +4 more }`
- **RecordButton**: Component. Props: `{ recording?: boolean, onToggle?: (recording: boolean) => void, disabled?: boolean, size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', class?: string, +1 more }`

### Layout
- **Box**: Component. Props: `{ p?: SpaceToken, px?: SpaceToken, py?: SpaceToken, pt?: SpaceToken, pr?: SpaceToken, +59 more }`
- **Container**: Component. Props: `{ maxW?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | string, px?: SpaceToken, py?: SpaceToken, center?: boolean, class?: string, +2 more }`
- **DocumentPage**: Component. Props: `{ size?: 'a4' | 'letter', orientation?: 'portrait' | 'landscape', padding?: string, children: JSX.Element, header?: JSX.Element, +3 more }`
- **Flex**: Component. Props: `{ direction?: 'row' | 'column' | 'row-reverse' | 'column-reverse', align?: 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'stretch' | 'baseline', justify?: 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'between' | 'around' | 'evenly', gap?: SpaceToken, wrap?: 'nowrap' | 'wrap' | 'wrap-reverse', +1 more }`
- **Grid**: Component. Props: `{ columns?: number | string, rows?: number | string, gap?: SpaceToken, rowGap?: SpaceToken, columnGap?: SpaceToken, +3 more }`
- **MasonryGrid**: Component. Props: `{ columns?: number | { sm?: number; md?: number; lg?: number; xl?: number }, gap?: SpaceToken, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties, children?: JSX.Element }`
- **MediaGrid**: Component. Props: `{ items: MediaGridItem[], selectedId?: string | null, onAdd?: (files: File[]) => void, onSelect?: (id: string) => void, onDelete?: (id: string) => void, +9 more }`
- **ScrollArea**: Component. Props: `{ children: JSX.Element, maxHeight?: string | number, class?: string }`
- **Section**: Component. Props: `{ bg?: 'default' | 'muted' | 'accent' | 'gradient', py?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl', maxWidth?: string, fullBleed?: boolean, children: JSX.Element, +3 more }`
- **Stack**: Component. Props: `{ direction?: 'vertical' | 'horizontal' }`
- **Text**: Component. Props: `{ size?: FontSizeToken, weight?: FontWeightToken | number, color?: TextColorToken, align?: 'left' | 'center' | 'right', truncate?: boolean, +14 more }`

### Feedback
- **EmptyState**: Component. Props: `{ icon?: string, title: string, description?: string, action?: JSX.Element, class?: string, +1 more }`
- **ErrorBanner**: Component. Props: `{ message: string, onDismiss?: () => void, variant?: ErrorBannerVariant, class?: string, autoDismissMs?: number, +1 more }`
- **ProgressBar**: Component. Props: `{ value?: number, indeterminate?: boolean, size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', color?: string, class?: string, +2 more }`
- **ProgressRing**: Component. Props: `{ value?: number, size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | number, strokeWidth?: number, color?: string, trackColor?: string, +4 more }`
- **Spinner**: Component. Props: `{ size?: SpinnerSize, color?: SpinnerColor, label?: string, class?: string, unstyled?: boolean }`
- **StreamingIndicator**: Component. Props: `{ visible: boolean, message?: string, class?: string }`

### Data & Content
- **ActionForm**: Component. Props: `{ target: string, action: string, onSubmit?: (result: DispatchResult) => void, onError?: (error: string) => void, submitLabel?: string, +2 more }`
- **DashboardGrid**: Component. Props: `{ minItemWidth?: string, gap?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl', maxColumns?: number, children: JSX.Element, class?: string, +2 more }`
- **DirectoryPicker**: Component. Props: `{ items: FileItem[], currentPath: string, onNavigate?: (path: string) => void, onBack?: () => void, onSelect?: (path: string) => void, +4 more }`
- **FileExplorer**: Component. Props: `{ items: FileItem[], currentPath: string, onNavigate?: (path: string) => void, onSelect?: (item: FileItem) => void, onBack?: () => void, mode?: ExplorerMode, selection?: Set<string>, onSelectionChange?: (sel: Set<string>) => void, onConfirm?: (items: FileItem[]) => void, previewPane?: boolean, showHidden?: boolean, loadChildren?: (path: string) => Promise<FileItem[]>, +16 more }`
- **FilePicker**: Component. Drop-in file-selection dialog. Props: `{ open: boolean, onClose: () => void, onPick: (items: FileItem[]) => void, items: FileItem[], defaultPath?: string, filter?: (item: FileItem) => boolean, multiple?: boolean, onNavigate?: (path: string) => void, loading?: boolean, title?: string, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **FileSavePicker**: Component. Drop-in save dialog with filename input + overwrite confirm. Props: `{ open: boolean, onClose: () => void, onSave: (directory: string, fileName: string) => void, items: FileItem[], defaultPath?: string, defaultFileName?: string, onNavigate?: (path: string) => void, loading?: boolean, title?: string, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }`
- **FilePreview**: Component. Auto-detecting preview pane. Props: `{ item: FileItem, class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties }` — detects image/video/audio/text/PDF/unknown from extension.
- **FileContextMenu**: Component. Right-click context menu. Props: `{ open: boolean, x: number, y: number, item: FileItem, onClose: () => void, onOpen?: (i) => void, onRename?: (i) => void, onDelete?: (i) => void, onCopyPath?: (i) => void, onShowInfo?: (i) => void, extraActions?: FileContextMenuAction[], onAction?: (id, item) => void }`
- **IssueBoard**: Component. Props: `{ issues: readonly Issue[], repos: readonly string[], groupBy?: 'repo' | 'label' | 'priority' | 'milestone' | 'none', view?: 'list' | 'board' | 'table', filters?: IssueFilters, +3 more }`
- **KanbanBoard**: Component. Props: `{ columns: KanbanColumn[], selectedCardId?: string | null, onCardClick?: (card: KanbanCard, columnId: string) => void, emptyState?: string, class?: string }`
- **MediaTrimmer**: Component. Props: `{ src: string, onTrimChange: (start: number, end: number) => void, thumbnailCount?: number, minDuration?: number, class?: string, +1 more }`
- **ProjectDashboard**: Component. Props: `{ projectName: string, milestones: readonly MilestoneData[], issues: readonly IssueData[], onRefresh?: () => void, onIssueClick?: (issue: IssueData) => void, +5 more }`
- **RepoCard**: Component. Props: `{ repo: RepoInfo, onOpen?: () => void, onTerminal?: () => void, onIssues?: () => void, onStartWork?: () => void }`
- **StatBar**: Component. Props: `{ items: StatBarItem[], size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg', direction?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical', class?: string, style?: JSX.CSSProperties, +1 more }`

### Chat & AI
- **ChatWindow**: Component. Props: `{ messages: Message[], connectionState: ConnectionState, streamingMessageId?: string, models?: ModelOption[], selectedModel?: string, +6 more }`
- **CostTracker**: Component. Props: `{ cost: number, inputTokens: number, outputTokens: number, compact?: boolean, class?: string }`
- **LLMChatBox**: Component. Props: `{ controller: LLMUIControllerReturn, title?: string, placeholder?: string, class?: string }`
- **MessageBubble**: Component. Props: `{ role: MessageRole, content: string, timestamp?: Date, isStreaming?: boolean, onCopy?: () => void, +4 more }`
- **MessageList**: Component. Props: `{ messages: Message[], streamingMessageId?: string, onCopyMessage?: (message: Message) => void, autoScroll?: boolean, class?: string }`
- **ModelSelector**: Component. Props: `{ models: ModelOption[], value?: string, onChange?: (modelId: string) => void, disabled?: boolean, class?: string }`
- **PromptQueue**: Component. Props: `{ items: QueuedPrompt[], onRemove?: (id: string) => void, class?: string }`
- **SessionIndicator**: Component. Props: `{ status: SessionStatus, name: string, model?: string, unreadCount?: number, class?: string }`
- **SessionManager**: Component. Props: `{ sessions: readonly SessionInfo[], onViewChat?: (sessionId: string) => void, onPause?: (sessionId: string) => void, onResume?: (sessionId: string) => void, onStop?: (sessionId: string) => void, +1 more }`
- **SessionSearch**: Component. Props: `{ sessions: SessionData[], onSelect: (result: SessionSearchResult) => void, open: boolean, onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void, placeholder?: string, +3 more }`
- **SessionTabs**: Component. Props: `{ tabs: SessionTab[], activeTabId?: string, onTabSelect?: (id: string) => void, onTabClose?: (id: string) => void, onNewTab?: () => void, +1 more }`
- **SubagentTracker**: Component. Props: `{ agents: SubagentInfo[], defaultExpanded?: boolean, onCancel?: (agentId: string) => void, class?: string }`
- **ToolApproval**: Component. Props: `{ tool: string, input: Record<string, unknown>, onApprove: (alwaysAllow: boolean) => void, onDeny: () => void, class?: string }`
- **ToolExecution**: Component. Props: `{ toolName: string, status: ToolStatus, input?: string, output?: string, duration?: number, +2 more }`

- **ThemePickerModal**: Component. Props: `{ open: boolean, onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void }`

- **Transition**: Component. Props: `{ preset?: TransitionPreset, duration?: number, children: JSX.Element }`

### Panel System
- **PanelGroup**: Component. Props: `{ panels: { config: PanelConfig; state: PanelState }[], direction: PanelDirection, onResize: (panelId: string, delta: number) => void, onCollapse: (panelId: string) => void, onExpand: (panelId: string) => void, +7 more }`

### Layouts
- **ChatLayout**: Component. Props: `{ sidebarOpen?: boolean, onSidebarToggle?: () => void, sidebarContent?: JSX.Element, tabs?: SessionTab[], activeTabId?: string, +5 more }`

### Report
- **Report**: Component. Props: `{ schema: ReportSchema, class?: string, embedded?: boolean, onSubmit?: (responses: Record<string, unknown>) => void }`

## Services & Hooks

### Effect Services
- **WebSocketService** (Effect Service): Methods: connect, disconnect, send, messages, isConnected
- **SessionService** (Effect Service): Methods: create, get, list, remove, setActive, getActive
- **FileSystemService** (Effect Service): Methods: listDirectory, getParentDirectory, isDirectory
- **ClipboardService** (Effect Service): Methods: copy, paste
- **LoggingService** (Effect Service): Methods: 

### Logging
- **makeLoggingLayer** (factory): factory
- **SimpleTransport** (constant): constant
- **ScopedTransport** (constant): constant
- **ConsoleTransport** (constant): constant
- **HttpTransport** (constant): constant
- **BeaconTransport** (constant): constant
- **SentryTransport** (constant): constant

### Hooks
- **useTheme** (hook): `() => UseThemeReturn`
- **useDesktop** (hook): `() => UseDesktopReturn`
- **useAnimation** (hook): `() => UseAnimationReturn`
- **createEffectResource** (hook): `<A, E>(effectFn: () => Effect.Effect<A, E>, options?: EffectResourceOptions<A, E...`
- **createEffectStream** (hook): `<A, E>(stream: Stream.Stream<A, E>, options?: EffectStreamOptions<A, E>) => Effe...`
- **useBreakpoint** (hook): `() => any`
- **useMode** (hook): `(initialMode?: Mode) => UseModeReturn`
- **useHaptic** (hook): `(options?: HapticOptions) => HapticReturn`
- **createHaptic** (hook): hook
- **useNotificationSound** (hook): `(options?: NotificationSoundOptions) => NotificationSoundReturn`
- **createNotificationSound** (hook): hook
- **createEventBus** (hook): hook
- **useEventBus** (hook): `<Events extends Record<string, unknown>>(bus: EventBus<Events>) => { emit: <K ex...`
- **useLogger** (hook): `(stream: Stream.Stream<LogEntry>, options?: UseLoggerOptions) => UseLoggerResult`
- **useVideoPreview** (hook): `(src: Accessor<string>) => UseVideoPreviewReturn`
- **createLLMUIController** (hook): `(options: LLMUIControllerOptions) => LLMUIControllerReturn`
- **useKeyboard** (hook): `() => KeyboardContextValue`
- **useShortcut** (hook): `(config: ShortcutConfig) => void`
- **useShortcuts** (hook): hook
- **usePanelLayout** (hook): `(configs: PanelConfig[], storageKey?: string, initialOverrides?: Partial<PanelLa...`
- **usePanelDrag** (hook): `(onMove: (panelId: string, toPosition: PanelPosition) => void) => { dragState: A...`
- **useNavigation** (hook): `() => NavigationContextValue`
- **useNavigable** (hook): `(contentRef: () => ContentRef, options?: { onOpenMenu?: (ref: ContentRef, positi...`
- **useDevTools** (hook): `() => NavigableDevToolsHandle`
- **useKnuthPlass** (hook): `(containerRef: () => HTMLElement, content?: () => string) => void`

### Providers
- **ToastProvider** (provider): provider
- **ThemeProvider** (provider): provider
- **AnimationProvider** (provider): provider
- **KeyboardProvider** (provider): provider
- **KeyboardScope** (provider): provider
- **ShortcutsHelp** (provider): provider

### Animation Utilities
- **enterAnimation** (utility): `(preset: TransitionPreset, durationMs?: number) => JSX.CSSProperties`
- **animationClass** (utility): `(preset: TransitionPreset) => string`
- **fadeIn** (utility): `{ from: { opacity: number; }; to: { opacity: number; }; }`
- **slideUp** (utility): `{ from: { opacity: number; transform: string; }; to: { opacity: number; transfor...`
- **slideDown** (utility): `{ from: { opacity: number; transform: string; }; to: { opacity: number; transfor...`
- **slideLeft** (utility): `{ from: { opacity: number; transform: string; }; to: { opacity: number; transfor...`
- **slideRight** (utility): `{ from: { opacity: number; transform: string; }; to: { opacity: number; transfor...`
- **scaleIn** (utility): `{ from: { opacity: number; transform: string; }; to: { opacity: number; transfor...`
- **scaleFade** (utility): `{ from: { opacity: number; transform: string; }; to: { opacity: number; transfor...`

### Theme Constants
- **themePresets** (constant): constant
- **modeDefinitions** (constant): constant

### Token Helpers
- **mapSpace** (utility): utility
- **mapBg** (utility): utility
- **mapTextColor** (utility): utility
- **mapRadius** (utility): utility
- **mapShadow** (utility): utility
- **mapZ** (utility): utility
- **mapFontSize** (utility): utility
- **mapFontWeight** (utility): utility
- **resolveSize** (utility): utility
- **formatShortcut** (utility): `(config: Pick<ShortcutConfig, "key" | "mod" | "ctrl" | "meta" | "shift" | "alt">...`

### Utilities
- **createSettingsStore** (hook): `(key?: string) => { loadSettings: () => SettingsConfig; saveSettings: (settings:...`
- **architectureReviewSchema** (constant): constant
- **validateProps** (utility): `(componentName: string, props: object, schema: PropSchema) => void`

### Server Utilities
- **createNavigableRouter** (factory): factory
- **generateMCPTools** (factory): factory
- **routeMCPToolCall** (factory): factory
- **buildToolName** (factory): factory

## Design Tokens

### SpaceToken
'0' | 'px' | 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | '3xl' | '4xl'

### FontSizeToken
'xs' | 'sm' | 'base' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | '3xl' | '4xl' | '5xl' | '6xl'

### FontWeightToken
'regular' | 'medium' | 'semibold' | 'bold' | 'extrabold' | 'black'

### BgToken
'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'elevated' | 'accent' | 'transparent'

### TextColorToken
'primary' | 'secondary' | 'muted' | 'on-accent'

### RadiusToken
'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'

### ShadowToken
'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl' | 'inner'

- [Full API Reference](./llms-full.txt)
- [Theme Guide](./docs/ai/theme.md)
- [Composition Patterns](./docs/ai/patterns.md)
